version.name: 2.0.B.004
version.author: Simple Sound Tools
version.changelog: Fix: Error in displaying weighted values for each take when using Weighted Take Randomization

version.name: 2.0.B.005
version.author: Simple Sound Tools
version.changelog: Update to repo README.md contents with installation video and user guide.

version.name: 2.0.B.009
version.author: Simple Sound Tools
version.changelog: Added button to open developer website.

version.name: 2.0.B.010

version.changelog: Added addition links to Discord, Buy Me A Coffee, and Simple Sound Tools website.

version.name: 2.0.B.011
version.author: Simple Sound Tools
version.changelog: Added addition links to Discord, Buy Me A Coffee, and Simple Sound Tools website.

version.name: 2.0.B.012
version.author: Simple Sound Tools
version.changelog: Added button to pack selected items as Random Container

version.name: 2.0.B.013
version.author: Simple Sound Tools
version.changelog: Added button to pack selected items when items are selected.

version.name: 2.0.B.014
version.author: Simple Sound Tools
version.changelog: Added buttons to pack selected items when items are selected.

version.name: 2.0.B.015
version.author: Simple Sound Tools
version.changelog: Moved pack take buttons to top of GUI.

version.name: 2.0.B.016
version.author: Simple Sound Tools
version.changelog: Moved pack take buttons to top of GUI to make them easier to find.

version.name: 2.0.B.017
version.author: Simple Sound Tools
version.changelog: - Testing... New feature for Randomize Active Take that allows the user to specify the number of takes that must be played before a previously selected take can be retriggered.
